limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No dollar amounts, named vendors, quantified headcount, or capex figures tied to AI are disclosed; only generic adoption language with named use-case category (generative AI tools) but no scale or budget detail.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Use cases are named only at the category level ('specific use cases') with no deployment metrics, operational detail, or quantified outcomes; scored 3 rather than 4 due to absence of production detail.
